channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Overhanging trees, 21st July
item.description:
Overgrown trees on the verges outside 292, 294 and 296 Worsley Bridge Road. These trees are causing a serious obstruction to the pavement. They are so overgrown, it is very difficult to walk underneath them as the gap between tree and pavement is very small.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 21st July
item.description:
Car engine left in alleyway left at the rear of St Augustine's primary school
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St Augustines Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and trolley full of rubbish, 21st July
item.description:
Rubbish bags in trolley. The church had an event on Saturday, is it their rubbish?’
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Victoria Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White Mercedes saloon NO REGISTRATION PLATES, 21st July
item.description:
This white Mercedes saloon has been parked in Worsley Bridge road for at least 10 days it has no registration plates front or rear. I could not see a VIN number any where in the windscreen. Looks in quite good condition outside and in. Might be stolen? who knows pass on to the police to have a look.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Copers Cope Road, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish as per photo, 21st July
item.description:
Dumped mattress and wood

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cottingham Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 21st July
item.description:
Rubbish up and down Ockham Drive in the gutters and on the pavements, esp outside number 6
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ockham Drive, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 black sacks dumped on Mayplace Road East pedestrian entrance to Orchard Allotments, 21st July
item.description:
Someone has dumped about 10 black sacks of rubbish on the pavement about 4 days ago. Please can they be removed asap
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mayplace Road East, Barnehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocked from access for tbe 3rd time this afternoon, 21st July
item.description:
Access problems and mess on unadopted road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hill Brow, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Burst pipe underground, 21st July
item.description:
Outside flats 1-15 Dahlia Road.burst pipe has been leaking water for over two months. Council know about it as does Tames water,. Neither of which seem to be that bothered about repairing. Since the water first started to rise to the surface it has got far worse. With water build up and puddles that can't drain away. It is now becoming a stream of water that is also becoming algae and incredibly slippery across the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Dahlia Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Home furniture dumped on Pavement, 21st July
item.description:
Home furniture dumped on pavement which is an obstruction for pedestrians, buggy, wheelchairs & mobility scooters All this flytipping that has recently taken place in this area is coincidental to hmo being converted on Pembroke Road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Valley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Keep left sign knocked over, 21st July
item.description:
The Keep left sign has been pull out of its fixing to the island again.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Downs Hill, Shortlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Discarded trees left near recycling station on Arnold Estate, 21st July
item.description:
Discarded trees left by recycling bin area on Arnold Estate, please remove.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 142-179, Sweeney Crescent, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Treated weeds just left to root, 21st July
item.description:
There’s loads of weeds been treated the just left to rot by the wall in Normanhurst Rd which now need sweeping up please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Normanhurst Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cardboard box waste, 21st July
item.description:
Dumped cardboard box waste I’m sharing a what3words address to help you find this specific location. Tap to see exactly where it is: ///pink.tracks.door https://w3w.co/pink.tracks.door

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cook's Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree mast needs sweeping up., 21st July
item.description:
Tree mast in the area around the park and outside houses adjacent to the park has built up and is blocking drains in the street. My husband unblocked one near where we park our car. The tree debris has turned solid. I haven't noticed any street sweeping having been done since January !
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Burgos Grove, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overhanging branches are blocking footpath, 21st July
item.description:
The back gate of my property (25 West Woodside) opens out onto the public footpath which leads to and from Bexley Woods. There is a tree directly outside my back gate in which either branches have snapped, or they have drooped, and they are now hanging so low that they are partially blocking the public footpath. I reported this problem a week or two ago and it has been reported as fixed, but the tree has not been trimmed at all, so I can only assume this got mixed up with another nearby overhanging tree issue. I am therefore opening a new case for the same issue.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 25, West Woodside, Albany Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lounge chairs dumped, 21st July
item.description:
2 lounge chairs have been dumped on Roding Road, at the cnr of Ashenden Road. Have been here since the weekend so assume a collection has not been arranged

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ashenden Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Cat/dog/fox poo, 21st July
item.description:
Animal poo on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wiltshire Road, Goddington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken lock, 21st July
item.description:
Ulitilies/service room within corner of morrisons underground car park has a damaged lock to the door. (evidence of routh sleeping and build up of rubbish and combustible items within room.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Jenner Close, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Electrical cable, 21st July
item.description:
A business called Greek Food wholesale has run a large electric cable to a lorry parked outside their premises for 6 months. It not there occasionally, but all the time. The cable crosses the pavement and is a trip hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Lea Road, Waltham Cross, Broxbourne
Report on FixMyStreet
